evals.prompt: 根据测试点生成完整测试用例，导出 Excel 格式。
evals.expected_output: 读取 specs/testpoints.md，生成 testcases.json（schema v2），调用 generate_excel.py 导出 .xlsx 文件到 artifacts/ 目录。
assertions: Reads specs/testpoints.md from the current change directory
Generates testcases.json with schema_version: 2 and testcases array
Each test case has id, title, feature, type, tp_refs, steps, expected_result, and priority
Calls generate_excel.py script to produce .xlsx file in artifacts/
Reports output file paths and generation summary

evals.prompt: 把测试点展开成用例，导出 XMind 思维导图。
evals.expected_output: 生成 testcases.json 后调用 generate_xmind.py 导出 .xmind 文件。
assertions: Generates testcases.json before calling the export script
Calls generate_xmind.py with correct --input and --output arguments
XMind output file is placed in artifacts/ directory
Test case titles follow the three-part naming convention: module_feature_scenario
Feature field matches the module part of the title

evals.prompt: 生成用例，这次重点覆盖异常和边界场景，不需要冒烟用例。
evals.expected_output: 策略偏向 exception + boundary 类型，生成的用例中异常和边界类型占比更高，不标记冒烟用例。
assertions: Respects user's explicit type preference (exception + boundary focus)
Generated test cases include boundary and exception types prominently
No test cases are marked as type '冒烟'
Test cases still maintain tp_refs traceability
Context metadata records the strategy_used reflecting user preference

evals.prompt: 生成用例后帮我跑一下校验脚本看看质量。
evals.expected_output: 生成 testcases.json 后调用 validate_testcases.py 校验，解读结果并自动修复问题。
assertions: Calls validate_testcases.py with --input and --testpoints arguments
Interprets validation results (PASS/WARN/FAIL)
Attempts auto-fix for WARN or FAIL issues (up to 2 rounds)
Re-validates after fixes
Reports final validation status to user
